ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, RB, WR) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Current salary of the player */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "height" TEXT /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_position" INTEGER /* Position the player was drafted */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended (if applicable) */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is injured */,
  "injury_details" TEXT /* Details of the player's injury */,
  "position_primary" TEXT /* Primary position of the player */,
  "position_secondary" TEXT /* Secondary position of the player (if applicable) */,
  "contract_expiration" INTEGER /* Year the player's contract expires */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Player's overall performance rating */,
  "team_join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined the team */,
  "team_exit_date" TEXT /* Date the player left the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Team's colors */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_twitter" TEXT /* Team's Twitter handle */,
  "team_facebook" TEXT /* Team's Facebook page */,
  "team_instagram" TEXT /* Team's Instagram page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "sport" TEXT /* Sport of the league (e.g., Football, Basketball, Baseball) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner_name" TEXT /* Name of the league's commissioner */,
  "league_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the league's logo */,
  "league_colors" TEXT /* League's colors */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL to the league's official website */,
  "league_twitter" TEXT /* League's Twitter handle */,
  "league_facebook" TEXT /* League's Facebook page */,
  "league_instagram" TEXT /* League's Instagram page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lineups" (
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lineup */,
  "lineup_num" INTEGER /* Lineup number */,
  "points_avg" REAL /* Average points scored by the lineup */,
  "points_ceil" REAL /* Maximum points scored by the lineup */,
  "points_floor" REAL /* Minimum points scored by the lineup */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the lineup belongs to */,
  "opposing_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "lineup_date" TEXT /* Date the lineup was created */,
  "lineup_status" TEXT /* Status of the lineup (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "lineup_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the lineup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lineup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lineups_opposing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opposing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "lineup_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lineup the statistic belongs to */,
  "median_value" REAL /* Median value of the statistic */,
  "upper_value" REAL /* Upper value of the statistic */,
  "lower_value" REAL /* Lower value of the statistic */,
  "median" REAL /* Median of the statistic */,
  "upper" REAL /* Upper of the statistic */,
  "lower" REAL /* Lower of the statistic */,
  "salary_remaining" INTEGER /* Salary remaining for the player */,
  "stat_date" TEXT /* Date the statistic was recorded */,
  "stat_game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., points, assists, rebounds) */,
  "stat_value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating for the statistic */,
  "stat_season" INTEGER /* Season the statistic belongs to */,
  "stat_week" INTEGER /* Week of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_stat_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_lineup_id FOREIGN KEY ("lineup_id") REFERENCES lineups ("lineup_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team playing the game */,
  "opposing_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "game_score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "game_climate" TEXT /* Climate conditions during the game */,
  "game_referees" TEXT /* List of referees for the game */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opposing_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opposing_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who owns the team */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user owns */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the user's fantasy team */,
  "team_created_date" TEXT /* Date the user's fantasy team was created */,
  "team_active_status" TEXT /* Status of the user's fantasy team (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "team_points" REAL /* Points scored by the user's fantasy team */,
  "team_ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the user's fantasy team */,
  "team_notes" TEXT /* Any notes or comments about the user's fantasy team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_teams_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., owner, analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions the user has */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL or path to the user's profile picture */,
  "bio" TEXT /* User's bio or description */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the user's social media profiles */,
  "preferred_sports" TEXT /* List of preferred sports */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
